steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The setup asks for evidence of STRAIN in Vanya and Serebrakoff's relationship—not just criticism, but direct tension or resentment between them.

steps.title: Match the signal
steps.content:
Choice B — Vanya says to Professor Serebrakoff, "For twenty-five years I have managed [the country estate], and have sent you the returns from it like the most honest of servants, and you have never given me one single word of thanks for my work, not one--neither in my youth nor now." shows Vanya directly expressing 25 years of accumulated resentment over ingratitude, exposing the core tension in their relationship.

The other three either make requests, describe Serebrakoff generally, or show Serebrakoff addressing Helena rather than reveal the interpersonal strain the question targets.

The resentment quotation is correct.
